title: FileRequest
description: FileRequest: Used to query Files from a Parent directory.

Location.description: Files from this location will be queried.

SearchSubdirectories.description: If enabled, look also in subdirectories.

MaxNesting.description:
If SearchSubdirectories is true, this sets the maximum subdirectiory nesting level to look in.
Defaults to -1 which corresponds to no limit.

MaxFiles.description:
Sets the maximum number of Files to retrieve, useful when using SearchSubdirectories.
Defaults to -1 which corresponds to no limit.

IncludeFileContents.description: Whether to include the contents of the Files.

Exclusions.description:
These files will be excluded from the results.
You can also specify string Full Paths.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
